creator: am@px.f1.ru
text:
I've just supped freebsd-stable kernel sources and found, that
	sys/conf/params.c file dated 23-Aug-1995 (and btw uses old
	TIMEZONE and DST definitions). Kernel cannot be compiled with such
	params.c code..

	May be I'd missed something?

Fix: 

update from current I think.. But for now it's not possible due to
	new options code :(
How-To-Repeat: 
	sup freebsd-stable kernel sources and try to compile kernel
